FrenFlow

Copy-trade prediction markets across Polymarket, Kalshi, Predict.fun and Hyperliquid

FrenFlow is a multi-venue prediction-market platform that lets you copy-trade the sharpest traders across Polymarket, Kalshi, Predict.fun, and Hyperliquid from one dashboard.

Supported venues

  • Polymarket
  • Kalshi
  • Predict.fun
  • Hyperliquid
Start copy-trading
